---
title: "Week 10 Notes"
author: "STAT 251 Section 03"
output:
  html_document: default
  #pdf_document: default
always_allow_html: true
header-includes:
  \usepackage{float}
  \usepackage{tikz}

---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggthemes)
library(ggpubr)
library(latex2exp)
library(gganimate)

path = 'Data/'
```

# NO CLASS - Spring Break!!!
